description: Letter from Farah b. Isma’il from Alexandria, to his father Isma’il, Fustat. October 22, 1050. Short letter about the money that Farah sent to his father and a request that Isma’il will sell the goods that Farah already sent him, and send him back the money as soon as possible. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #499) VMR (Alt: ENA L43)
